data.body:
## AMENDMENT: Expanded scope from gap analysis

### Additional tests to write
10. test_claude_safe_no_dot_tickets_comment — verify claude-safe has no .tickets/ comment (only .tickets-tracker/)
11. test_retro_gather_no_orphaned_tasks_call — verify retro-gather.sh does not call orphaned-tasks.sh
12. test_sprint_next_batch_no_tk_prefix_vars — verify sprint-next-batch.sh has no tk_show, tk_priority variable names
13. test_qualify_ticket_refs_deleted — verify qualify-ticket-refs.sh does not exist (migration tool no longer needed)

### Additional test files to update (tests that verify removed behavior)
When the source exclusions are removed, these existing tests will break. Task 2 must also update:
- tests/scripts/test-orphaned-tasks.sh → DELETE (tests deleted script)
- tests/hooks/test-compute-diff-hash-tickets.sh → UPDATE (remove .tickets/ exclusion assertions, keep .tickets-tracker/)
- tests/scripts/test-claude-safe-tickets-dir.sh → UPDATE (.tickets/ → .tickets-tracker/ in fixture/assertions)
- tests/hooks/test-review-gate-non-reviewable.sh → UPDATE (remove .tickets/ from non-reviewable list if needed)
- tests/hooks/test-pre-edit-write-dispatcher.sh → UPDATE (remove .tickets/ title-length test fixture)
- tests/run-all.sh → UPDATE (remove temp .tickets/ test isolation dir, use .tickets-tracker/)
- tests/evals/evals.json → UPDATE (.tickets/ pattern → .tickets-tracker/)
